pos.label: POS Terminal
pos.changelog: Fix item toggle ON bug, advance order shows only current branch data

captain.label: Captain App
captain.changelog: Action sheet for occupied tables, elapsed timer badges, unsent KOT badge, optional guest info capture

kds.label: Kitchen Display
kds.changelog: Coloured source stripe, table-first card header, highlighted item notes, large-screen support for Android TV and 21-50" monitors

ownerWeb.label: Owner Dashboard
ownerWeb.changelog: App Store download page, update notifications
